steps.title: Read the original intercept
steps.content: From the scatterplot, the line of best fit for data set A has a $y$-intercept of about $53.75$.

steps.title: Shift the intercept down
steps.content:
Data set B subtracts $11$ from every $y$-value, so the whole line of best fit shifts down $11$ units. The new intercept is
$$53.75-11=42.75$$The answer is C.
